title: Asahikawa Heavy Rain
lead: Asahikawa experiences critical heavy rain with a Z-Score of -4.09. The event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Asahikawa is causing significant disruptions. 
 The high humidity of 87% and moderate wind speed of 5.5 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The HDD of 15.3 GG and CDD of 0.0 GG indicate a substantial impact on heating demands.
